# Auto-generated API docs (mkdocstrings)

This page demonstrates automatic API documentation using mkdocstrings (Python handler).

Prerequisites

- Install docs dependencies: `pip install -r requirements-docs.txt` or `pip install mkdocstrings[python] pytkdocs mkdocs-material`
- Ensure the package is importable (CI: `pip install -e .` or `pip install -e .[docs]`).

Usage

The following directives will render the Pydantic model and the query_tasks function signatures and docstrings.

::: taskmajor.domains.tasks.filters.TaskQueryFilters

::: taskmajor.domains.tasks.task_service.TaskService.query_tasks

Notes

- mkdocstrings imports the package to extract docstrings. Avoid side-effects at import time in modules.
- If mkdocstrings fails in CI, ensure the build environment has the same extras installed as your local dev environment.
